---
title: "About"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## About this project

This is a learning project built by a high school student learning R and workflowr.

The dataset is the TCGA breast cancer clinical cohort (1,101 patients) from 
cBioPortal, containing patient demographics, tumor staging, histological 
subtype, and survival data.

The analysis was written entirely in R using tidyverse tools (`dplyr` and 
`ggplot2`), structured with `workflowr` for reproducibility, and version 
controlled with Git. This was my first real R project working with clinical 
genomics data. The focus was on learning the workflow correctly, not on 
producing publishable results.
